title: debesia
intro: Debesia, commonly known as Debesia madagascariensis, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Debesia is believed to have therapeutic actions such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The bioactive constituents of Debesia include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
